title: Black communities - Canada.ca
content:
Federal initiatives aimed at supporting Black communities and Black-led organizations across Canada.
Register and receive notifications emails regarding federal measures to support Black Communities.

### United Nations International Decade for People of African Descent
International initiative to address the challenges faced by individuals and communities of African descent.

### Supporting Black Canadian Communities Initiative
Building capacity, sharing knowledge, and applying a Black-centric lens on federal programs.

### Black Entrepreneurship Program
Loans and other financial support for Black Canadian business owners and entrepreneurs.

### Black-led Philanthropic Endowment Fund
For Black-led, Black-serving, and Black-focused charities and non-profits.

### Mental Health of Black Canadians Fund
For community initiatives that promote mental health for Black Canadians.

### Canada’s Black Justice Strategy
Ensuring that Black people have access to equal treatment before and under the law in Canada.

### Canadian Institute for People of Afrikan Ancestry
The centre of research for improving the outcomes of Black persons and communities in Canada.

### Affordable Housing Fund: Black-led Organizations
To build housing that benefits Black households.

### External Reference Group
Provides the Minister with Black-centric expertise on how to support Black Canadian Communities.

## Other important programs

### Federal Anti-Racism Secretariat
A federal initiative that focuses on identifying systemic racial barriers and combatting racial discrimination.

### Multicultural and Anti-Racism Program
Fosters ethnocultural diversity and inclusion, and helps equity-deserving populations and organizations.
- Black communities news
More: Black communities news

### United Nations Permanent Forum on People of African Descent
The international body that is working to improve the quality of life of people of African descent.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
